text.value: Please press the button below to capture GPS
Accompany the client to the health facility.
Have you taken the child to any health facility?
Has the child been diagnosed with clubfoot?
Provide education on the importance of continuing treatment for a child with clubfoot.
Which district is the health facility located?
Where is the health facility located?
Assess the child to detect clubfoot.
Did the child receive clubfoot service?

I am referring you to take the child to the nearest health facility, and I will follow up on the referral in a few days. It is important to go to the health facility as soon as possible to prevent permanent disability for the child.
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
Tafadhali bonyeza kitufe kilichopo chini ili kuchukua GPS
Ambatana na mteja kuelekea kituo cha afya.
Je mtoto umempeleka kituo chochote cha afya?
Je mtoto amegundulika na tatizo la mguu rungu?
Toa elimu kuhusu umuhimu wa kuendelea na matibabu ya mtoto mwenye tatizo la mguu rungu.
Ni wilaya gani kituo cha afya kipo?
Ni wapi kituo cha afya kilipo?
Mfanyie mtoto ukaguzi ili kubaini mguu rungu.
Je mtoto alipatiwa huduma za mguu rungu?
Nakupa rufaa kumpeleka mtoto kituo cha afya cha karibu na nitarudi baada ya siku chache kufuatilia rufaa. Ni muhimu kwenda kituo cha afya mapema ili kuepusha ulemavu wa kudumu kwa mtoto
Hospitali ya wilaya ya Chake Chake

bind.relevant: selected( /clubfoot/select_visit/select_visit_type ,"review") and selected( /clubfoot/health/attend_health_center ,"yes") and (selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_island ,"unguja") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_island ,"pemba"))

selected( /clubfoot/select_visit/select_visit_type ,"review") and selected( /clubfoot/health/attend_health_center ,"yes") and (selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_island ,"unguja") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_island ,"pemba")) and (selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"north_a") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"north_b") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"central") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"south") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"west_a") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"west_b") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"urban") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"chakechake") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"micheweni") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"mkoani") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"wete"))

selected( /clubfoot/select_visit/select_visit_type ,"review") and selected( /clubfoot/health/attend_health_center ,"yes") and (selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_island ,"unguja") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_island ,"pemba") ) and (selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"north_a") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"north_b") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"central") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"south") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"west_a") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"west_b") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"urban") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"chakechake") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"micheweni") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"mkoani") or selected( /clubfoot/health/facility_district ,"wete")) and selected( /clubfoot/health/visit_facility ,"other")
